form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.56) at this track in a Free For All, finishing seventh and beaten 8 lengths. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Has ability and should be around the money.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.5 lengths over 390m at Ballarat in a handy 22.07, beating Paw Xanthie. Goes very well from this box including three wins. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.5 lengths over 390m at Ballarat in a handy 22.07, beating Paw Xanthie. Goes very well from this box including three wins. Leading player.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Contacted on first turn and lost ground.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 390m at this track in a handy (22.57), beating Princetown Flyer. Will find this a bit tougher, others preferred on this occasion.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by half a length over 390m at this track in a handy (22.57), beating Princetown Flyer. Will find this a bit tougher, others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 3.5 lengths over 390m at Ballarat (22.30). Top-three hope with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior he recorded a handy 22.24 over 390m finishing third at this track. Harder here and one for the multiples.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won easily by 6 lengths at this track (22.41) beating Paw Kara in a Grade 5 on April 2. This will test.

form.formComment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished third at this track in 22.19 last time but the start prior recorded a slick 22.14 over 390m finishing second at this track. Hard to top on the time from two back.
